steps.title: Match the plural noun
steps.content: The blank modifies cities, a plural noun. The previous sentence names two cities, Kisumu and Quito, so the demonstrative must also be plural.

steps.title: Use a plural demonstrative
steps.content: The plural demonstrative correctly points back to the two cities. B and C are singular forms, and D treats the cities separately rather than naturally referring to both together as sitting near the equator. The answer is A.
